name: @forwardimpact/svcvector
description: Vector similarity search over gRPC — semantic retrieval without a dedicated database per product.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Adding semantic search to a product and realizing each one would need its own vector store.
jobs.bigHire: run semantic search from any product without standing up a per-product database.
jobs.littleHire: search for semantically related content without managing embeddings storage.
jobs.competesWith: per-product vector databases; keyword search instead of semantic; skipping retrieval entirely
